title: Hero Rescue Moment
intendedTensionBeat: A hero puppy is visibly threatened, but the urgent route is readable within seconds.
intendedReleaseBeat: The hero rescue lands as the emotional capstone of onboarding.
expectedPath: Identify the urgent hero route quickly, make disciplined route clears, rescue the hero puppy, then finish the secondary rescue.
expectedFailMode: Player chases a tempting low-value side route and loses hero tempo.
designNotes: L15 should be memorable and readable, not simply the hardest board. Prioritize sightline clarity without using empty-board shortcuts.
